testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests loads edit page for a MySQL table without PostgreSQL fallback error
testcase.classname: loads edit page for a MySQL table without PostgreSQL fallback error

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests handles boolean toggle correctly and persists changes
testcase.classname: handles boolean toggle correctly and persists changes

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests accepts empty values for nullable fields without errors
testcase.classname: accepts empty values for nullable fields without errors

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests updates a standard text field correctly
testcase.classname: updates a standard text field correctly

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests creates a new record in a MySQL table and verifies search works
testcase.classname: creates a new record in a MySQL table and verifies search works

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests does not break when PostgreSQL-specific UI components are absent
testcase.classname: does not break when PostgreSQL-specific UI components are absent

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests formats HTML5 datetime-local input safely for MySQL
testcase.classname: formats HTML5 datetime-local input safely for MySQL

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests searches for a newly created record and finds it
testcase.classname: searches for a newly created record and finds it

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests deletes a record and confirms it no longer appears on the grid
testcase.classname: deletes a record and confirms it no longer appears on the grid

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests changes number of rows per page and updates pagination info
testcase.classname: changes number of rows per page and updates pagination info

testcase.name: MySQL CRUD E2E Tests allows inline editing of a field and persists the change
testcase.classname: allows inline editing of a field and persists the change
